items.name: leo-cdp-framework
items.description: LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing — powered by big data and machine learning.

items.name: ARLUME
items.description: RLUME is a C++ console-based movie recommendation system that helps users discover films based on their personal preferences . The project has basic Machine Learning concepts to create personalized recommendations . It demonstrates how  to build a recommendation system without relying on large frameworks.

items.name: quantum-inspired
items.description: This project implements a multilayer perceptron entirely from first principles using NumPy, without machine learning frameworks. The goal is to establish a classical baseline before investigating quantum-inspired feature mappings for forecasting tasks.

items.name: SmartHire-Cognitive-Interview-Response-Evaluation-Neural-Framework
items.description: Cognitive Interview Response Evaluation Neural Framework is an AI-powered platform that evaluates interview responses using NLP and machine learning. It analyzes semantic relevance, clarity, coherence, and completeness, generates scores and personalized feedback, and helps recruiters conduct fair, efficient, and data-driven candidate assessments.

items.name: Liver-Disease-Diagnosis
items.description: An end-to-end clinical machine learning framework for automated diagnosis of liver disease from blood panel bio-markers. Integrates feature engineering based on clinical normal medical ranges, SMOTE class balancing, multi-model cross-validation, and a Soft-Voting Hybrid Ensemble achieving 99.70% diagnostic accuracy.

items.name: Phishing-Website-Detection-Using-Optimised-Machine-Learning-And-Deep-Learning
items.description: This project develops an enhanced phishing detection framework using a novel hybrid CNN + XGBoost architecture. It employs a Hybrid Ensemble Feature Selection (HEFS) methodology and compares tuned models such as Random Forest, XGBoost, CNN, and TCN via meta-learning layers to provide a robust solution for identifying malicious URLs.

items.name: Novel-Hybrid-Protein-Scaffold-Gap-Filling

items.name: rv32i-coverage-closure
items.description: Automated machine-learning verification framework using cocotb, cocotb-coverage, and UCB1 Multi-Armed Bandit algorithm to accelerate functional coverage closure on a 5-stage pipelined RV32I CPU. Closes 100% functional coverage 4.9× faster than uniform random stimulus and speeds up microarchitectural RTL bug discovery by up to 16.4×.
